summary: Matriz Dinámica Changes - TABLE modal format and dd-mm-yy date formatting fully tested. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified including TABLE modal, dd-mm-yy dates, overdue dates in red, DIV badge, Traza/Abrir buttons, cell filtering.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/matriz returns fecha_inicio_prod field (first movement's fecha_inicio)
Backend: dias_proceso calculated from fecha_inicio_prod (not fecha_creacion)
Backend: dias_proceso = 0 when registro has no movements (fecha_inicio_prod is null)
Backend: Registro 02 has dias_proceso=23 from fecha_inicio_prod=2026-03-01
Backend: Registro 04-1 (hijo/DIV) has dias_proceso=0 because no movements
Frontend: Modal opens as TABLE (not cards) with proper HTML table structure
Frontend: Modal headers: Corte, Estado, Modelo, Prendas, Curva, Hilo Esp., Ruta, Entrega, Inicio Prod., Días, Últ. Mov, Dif., Info, Acción
Frontend: Dates in modal show dd-mm-yy format (e.g., 01-03-26, 20-02-26)
Frontend: Overdue dates (fecha_entrega past today) show in red/destructive color (20-02-26)
Frontend: DIV badge shows for fractioned child registros (04-1)
Frontend: Click on cell filters modal to only that estado's registros (e.g., Estampado shows 1 registro)
Frontend: Click on item name shows ALL registros for that item (4 registros)
Frontend: /reportes/en-proceso shows dates in dd-mm-yy format (31-03-26, 20-02-26)
Frontend: /reportes/atrasados shows dates in dd-mm-yy format (20-02-26)
Frontend: /reportes/trazabilidad shows dates in dd-mm-yy format (01-03-26, 03-03-26, 07-03-26, 20-03-26, 21-03-26)
Frontend: /reportes/wip-etapa shows 'lote más antiguo' in dd-mm-yy format (17-03-26, 18-03-26)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend LATERAL JOIN for mov_first.primera_fecha correctly calculates dias_proceso from first movement's fecha_inicio
Frontend fmtDate function correctly formats YYYY-MM-DD to dd-mm-yy
Modal DetalleModal component uses proper HTML table structure with sticky header
All report pages (EnProceso, Atrasados, Trazabilidad, WIPEtapa) use consistent fmtDate function
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: 4 active registros (02=Atraque/Ojal with 3 movimientos and fecha_inicio_prod=2026-03-01 -> dias_proceso=23, 03=Estampado with fecha_inicio_prod=2026-03-23 -> dias_proceso=1, 04=Costura padre with fecha_inicio_prod=2026-03-18 -> dias_proceso=6, 04-1=Costura hijo DIV with no movements -> dias_proceso=0). Overdue: 04 and 04-1 have fecha_entrega=2026-02-20 which is past.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Matriz Dinámica changes fully implemented: 1) Modal is now TABLE format (not cards) with headers: Corte, Estado, Modelo, Prendas, Curva, Hilo Esp., Ruta, Entrega, Inicio Prod., Días, Últ. Mov, Dif., Info, Acción. 2) All dates in dd-mm-yy format across all report pages. 3) dias_proceso now calculated from first movement's fecha_inicio (not fecha_creacion). Fixed missing fmtDate function in ReporteWIPEtapa.jsx. Test file updated with 2 new tests for dias_proceso calculation.
